[D1] (4:7-4:11) TS6133: 'User' is declared but its value is never read.
  (no quick fixes)

[D2] (5:6-5:10) TS6196: 'User' is declared but never used.
  (no quick fixes)

[D3] (5:13-5:44) TS377104: Do not use `Schema.Schema.Type<typeof X>` to extract a schema's type. Use `typeof X.Type` instead. effect(preferSchemaTypeProperty)
  Fix 0: "Disable preferSchemaTypeProperty for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable preferSchemaTypeProperty for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with 'typeof User.Type'"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable preferSchemaTypeProperty for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable preferSchemaTypeProperty for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 2: "Replace with 'typeof User.Type'" ===

--- file:///.src/preferSchemaTypeProperty_preview.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics preferSchemaTypeProperty:error
import { Schema } from "effect"

const User = Schema.Struct({ name: Schema.String })
type User = typeof User.Type
